steps.title: Substitute x = 2 into the function
steps.content: We're given $f(x) = 2 \cdot 3^x$ and need to find $f(2)$. Substitute $x = 2$ directly into the function: $$f(2) = 2 \cdot 3^2$$

steps.title: Evaluate the exponential and multiply
steps.content: Evaluate $3^2 = 9$. Then multiply: $$f(2) = 2 \cdot 9 = 18$$ That confirms C is correct.
